mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and weakening consumer spending, which compresses corporate earnings forecasts and drives negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered instances over a 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansions in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer demand growth, boosting corporate revenue expectations and producing positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 60-day returns in more than 60% of observed cases across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth that outpaces monetary tightening signals resilient manufacturing capacity and supply-side strength, triggering short-term risk-on positioning and positive weekly returns.
failure_condition: Signal accuracy falls below 50% for predicting positive 5-day returns during periods of rising federal funds rates.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above the threshold trigger expectations of aggressive central bank policy tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 50% of high-CPI observations over a 3-year rolling evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms labor market tightening and wage growth, strengthening corporate revenue outlooks and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances across all tested market environments.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly increases aggregate corporate earnings fundamentals, generating positive forward equity returns over a quarterly investment horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 5-year rolling window, or quarterly returns show no statistical correlation with GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Contracting industrial output alongside rising inflation signals stagflationary pressure, forcing institutional risk-off positioning and generating negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Signal yields positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered cases over a 4-year out-of-sample period.
